This file standardizes activity histories, clusters nearby sites, and writes
all-city active dates plus site impervious metadata.

```{r}
# TODO: add comments

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(sf)
library(igraph)
library(terra)

```

```{r}

input_path <- "../Input Data/"

season_dates <- data.frame(
  Season = 1:41,
  season_name = c("JA16", "AP16", "JU16", "OC16",
                  "JA17", "AP17", "JU17", "OC17",
                  "JA18", "AP18", "JU18", "OC18",
                  "JA19", "AP19", "JU19", "OC19",
                  "JA20", "AP20", "JU20", "OC20",
                  "JA21", "AP21", "JU21", "OC21",
                  "JA22", "AP22", "JU22", "OC22",
                  "JA23", "AP23", "JU23", "OC23",
                  "JA24", "AP24", "JU24", "OC24",
                  "JA25", "AP25", "JU25", "OC25",
                  "JA26"),
  start_date = as.Date(c("2015-12-18",
                         "2016-03-18", "2016-06-17", "2016-09-17", "2016-12-18",
                         "2017-03-18", "2017-06-17", "2017-09-17", "2017-12-18",
                         "2018-03-18", "2018-06-17", "2018-09-17", "2018-12-18",
                         "2019-03-18", "2019-06-17", "2019-09-17", "2019-12-18",
                         "2020-03-18", "2020-06-17", "2020-09-17", "2020-12-18",
                         "2021-03-18", "2021-06-17", "2021-09-17", "2021-12-18",
                         "2022-03-18", "2022-06-17", "2022-09-17", "2022-12-18",
                         "2023-03-18", "2023-06-17", "2023-09-17", "2023-12-18",
                         "2024-03-18", "2024-06-17", "2024-09-17", "2024-12-18",
                         "2025-03-18", "2025-06-17", "2025-09-17", "2025-12-18")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("2016-02-14", "2016-05-14", "2016-08-14", "2016-11-14",
                       "2017-02-14", "2017-05-14", "2017-08-14", "2017-11-14",
                       "2018-02-14", "2018-05-14", "2018-08-14", "2018-11-14",
                       "2019-02-13", "2019-05-14", "2019-08-14", "2019-11-14",
                       "2020-02-13", "2020-05-14", "2020-08-14", "2020-11-14",
                       "2021-02-13", "2021-05-14", "2021-08-14", "2021-11-14",
                       "2022-02-13", "2022-05-14", "2022-08-14", "2022-11-14",
                       "2023-02-13", "2023-05-14", "2023-08-14", "2023-11-14",
                       "2024-02-13", "2024-05-14", "2024-08-14", "2024-11-14",
                       "2025-02-13", "2025-05-14", "2025-08-14", "2025-11-14",
                       "2026-02-13"))
)

all_day_cols <- paste0("Day_", 1:60)

```

```{r}

multi_city_raw <- read.csv(paste0(input_path, "zellmer_observation_history.csv"))

multi_city_activity <- multi_city_raw %>%
  rename(locAbbr = Site, Longitude = Long, Latitude = Lat) %>%
  filter(City != "mela") %>%
  mutate(
    City = recode(
      City,
      autx = "AUTX", boma = "BOMA", chil = "CHIL", inin = "ININ",
      ioio = "ICIA", jams = "JAMS", slmo = "SLMO", tawa = "TAWA", uril = "URIL"
    )
  )

multi_city_activity <- multi_city_activity[multi_city_activity$locAbbr != "LAC2", ]
multi_city_activity <- multi_city_activity[multi_city_activity$locAbbr != "SSP2", ]
multi_city_activity$Latitude = ifelse(
  multi_city_activity$locAbbr == "P-TE2",
  multi_city_activity$Latitude * 10,
  multi_city_activity$Latitude
)

season_lookup <- setNames(season_dates$Season, season_dates$season_name)
multi_city_activity$Season <- as.integer(unname(season_lookup[multi_city_activity$Season]))

site_info_multi <- multi_city_activity %>%
  select(City, locAbbr, Longitude, Latitude) %>%
  distinct(City, locAbbr, .keep_all = TRUE)

complete_rows_multi <- expand_grid(
  locAbbr = unique(multi_city_activity$locAbbr),
  Season = season_dates$Season
) %>%
  left_join(site_info_multi, by = "locAbbr") %>%
  filter(City %in% multi_city_activity$City)

multi_city_complete <- complete_rows_multi %>%
  left_join(multi_city_activity, by = c("Season", "City", "locAbbr", "Latitude", "Longitude")) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("Day_"), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
  select(Season, City, locAbbr, Latitude, Longitude, starts_with("Day_"))

missing_day_cols_multi <- setdiff(all_day_cols, names(multi_city_complete))
for (col_name in missing_day_cols_multi) {
  multi_city_complete[[col_name]] <- FALSE
}

multi_city_complete <- multi_city_complete %>%
  select(Season, City, locAbbr, Latitude, Longitude, all_of(all_day_cols))

```

```{r}

paca_raw <- read.csv(paste0(input_path, "OccupancyReport - Active Dates.csv"), skip = 2)
paca_start_date <- as.Date("2018-09-15")

paca_daily <- paca_raw %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("Day_"), ~ case_when(
    is.na(.) ~ "Inactive",
    . %in% c(0, 1) ~ "Active"
  ))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Day_"),
    names_to = "Day",
    values_to = "Status"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    day_number = as.integer(gsub("Day_", "", Day)),
    date = paca_start_date + days(day_number - 1),
    Status = Status == "Active"
  ) %>%
  select(-Day, -day_number, -Season)

get_season <- function(timestamp) {
  idx <- which(timestamp >= season_dates$start_date & timestamp <= season_dates$end_date)
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  season_dates$Season[idx[1]]
}

paca_by_season <- paca_daily %>%
  mutate(Season = vapply(date, get_season, integer(1))) %>%
  drop_na(Season) %>%
  rename(locAbbr = Site) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  left_join(season_dates %>% select(Season, start_date), by = "Season") %>%
  mutate(relative_day = as.integer(difftime(date, start_date, units = "days")) + 1) %>%
  filter(relative_day >= 1 & relative_day <= 60) %>%
  select(Season, locAbbr, Latitude, Longitude, relative_day, Status)

paca_wide <- paca_by_season %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = relative_day, values_from = Status, names_prefix = "Day_") %>%
  mutate(City = "PACA")

site_info_paca <- paca_wide %>%
  select(City, locAbbr, Longitude, Latitude) %>%
  distinct(City, locAbbr, .keep_all = TRUE)

complete_rows_paca <- expand_grid(
  locAbbr = unique(paca_wide$locAbbr),
  Season = season_dates$Season
) %>%
  left_join(site_info_paca, by = "locAbbr")

paca_complete <- complete_rows_paca %>%
  left_join(paca_wide, by = c("Season", "City", "locAbbr", "Latitude", "Longitude")) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("Day_"), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), FALSE, .))) %>%
  select(Season, City, locAbbr, Latitude, Longitude, starts_with("Day_"))

missing_day_cols_paca <- setdiff(all_day_cols, names(paca_complete))
for (col_name in missing_day_cols_paca) {
  paca_complete[[col_name]] <- FALSE
}

paca_complete <- paca_complete %>%
  select(Season, City, locAbbr, Latitude, Longitude, all_of(all_day_cols))

```

```{r}

normalized_activity <- bind_rows(multi_city_complete, paca_complete)

site_coords <- normalized_activity %>%
  select(City, locAbbr, Longitude, Latitude) %>%
  distinct(City, locAbbr, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(site_key = paste(City, locAbbr, sep = "::"))

sites_sf <- st_as_sf(site_coords, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)
sites_utm <- st_transform(sites_sf, crs = 32611)

neighbors <- st_is_within_distance(sites_utm, sites_utm, dist = 150)
g <- make_empty_graph(n = nrow(sites_utm), directed = FALSE)

for (i in seq_along(neighbors)) {
  for (j in neighbors[[i]]) {
    if (i < j) {
      g <- add_edges(g, c(i, j))
    }
  }
}

site_coords$cluster_id <- components(g)$membership

site_to_cluster <- site_coords %>%
  group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  mutate(locAbbr2 = first(locAbbr)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(City, locAbbr, locAbbr2, Longitude, Latitude)

```

```{r}

cluster_activity <- normalized_activity %>%
  left_join(site_to_cluster %>% select(City, locAbbr, locAbbr2), by = c("City", "locAbbr")) %>%
  group_by(Season, City, locAbbr2) %>%
  summarize(across(all_of(all_day_cols), ~ any(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  rename(locAbbr = locAbbr2) %>%
  select(Season, City, locAbbr, all_of(all_day_cols))

```

```{r}

cluster_points <- site_to_cluster %>%
  group_by(locAbbr2) %>%
  summarize(
    Longitude = mean(Longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    Latitude = mean(Latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

impervious_raster <- rast(paste0(input_path, "Annual_NLCD_FctImp_2024_CU_C1V1.tif"))
cluster_points_v <- vect(cluster_points, geom = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = "EPSG:4326")
cluster_points_v <- project(cluster_points_v, crs(impervious_raster))
cluster_buffers <- buffer(cluster_points_v, width = 1000)

impervious_vals <- terra::extract(impervious_raster[[1]], cluster_buffers, fun = mean)
cluster_points$Impervious <- impervious_vals[, 2]

camera_sites_with_impervious <- site_to_cluster %>%
  left_join(cluster_points %>% select(locAbbr2, Impervious), by = "locAbbr2")

```

```{r}

write.csv(cluster_activity, paste0(input_path, "all_city_active_dates.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(camera_sites_with_impervious, paste0(input_path, "camera_sites_with_impervious.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```
